title: viola × pauperfillora
intro: Viola × pauperfillora, also known as the Poor Man's Violet, is a rare and unique hybrid plant that is a cross between the common violet (Viola sororia) and the pale violet (Viola palustris). The plant's medicinal properties include its potential to exhibit anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can aid in reducing pain and fighting off infections. The health benefits of Viola × pauperfillora are said to include reducing stress and anxiety, improving sleep quality, and boosting the immune system. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
